div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 2. 后端控制器建立 SseEmitter 连通通道

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 3. 注入 RAG 简历向量及会话历史上下文

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 4. 模型路由网关发起流式 API 请求 (OkHttp)

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 5. 外部模型提供商逐步吐出 Text Chunk

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 6. 网关层增量解析内容并识别结束标记 [DONE]

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 7. 核心服务通过 SseEmitter.send 推送数据

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 8. 前端 fetch / ReadableStream 流式迭代读取

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 9. requestAnimationFrame 帧率节流缓冲渲染 (60fps)

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 11. 后端线程异步将完整大模型回复保存至 MySQL

div.style: color: rgb(37, 37, 37) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: 12. 解锁前端输入框，单轮对话交互闭环
